hook: A person pushing against your limits is giving you information, not an invitation to erase them.
body: How someone responds to a boundary often tells you more about long-term fit than how charming they were before it existed.

hook: Some men collapse their standards the moment attraction is high because they are afraid limits will cost them the connection.
body: If a boundary kills the dynamic, the dynamic may not have been healthy enough to keep.

hook: If a boundary kills the dynamic, the dynamic may not have been healthy enough to keep.
body: Someone who mocks your limit instead of respecting it is revealing a lot faster than you might want to admit.

body: Judge people partly by how they handle your no, not only by how they enjoy your yes.
